reference: Every few weeks, I get a flutter in my heart. It is not a fast heartbeat, but a fluttering back and forth. I don't think it is pumping, just fluttering. After about five seconds of this, I start to feel faint and almost pass out. Fortunately, every time this has happened, my heart self-corrected and began to beat normally. However, I am scared that at some point, it will not stop, and I will pass out and die. I have no insurance. What can I do?
text: Every few weeks, I get a flutter in my heart. It is not a fast heartbeat, but a fluttering back and forth. I don't think it is pumping, just fluttering. After about five seconds of this, I start to feel faint and almost pass out. Fortunately, every time this has happened, my heart self-corrected and began to beat normally. However, I am scared that at some point it will not stop, and I will pass out and die. I have no insurance. What can I do?
